response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance of '愛♡スクリ～ム！' (Ai ♡ Scream) by checking the on-screen credits. 2. Identified the performers as Hakui Koyori, AZKi, and Momosuzu Nene via their call-outs in the song and their appearance. 3. Searched for the lyrics of the song using the composers 'DJ Chika a.k.a. INHERIT', 'HAYATO YAMAMOTO', and the lyricist 'aim'. Found accurate lyrics. 4. Broken down the video into 3 scenes: performance, transition, and talk/gameplay.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of the song 'Ai ♡ Scream' (愛♡スクリ～ム！) by VTubers Hakui Koyori, AZKi, and Momosuzu Nene during the 'Hakui Koyori Birthday Live 2026', followed by a short transition and gameplay footage.

scenes.description: The VTubers Hakui Koyori, AZKi, and Momosuzu Nene perform the song 'Ai ♡ Scream' (愛♡スクリ～ム！). Credits for the song (Music/Lyrics) appear on-screen.

scenes.description: The music stops and the scene transitions with a logo animation.
The VTubers are shown in a gameplay interface, performing commentary over the game footage.
